name: Diameter of Binary Tree
description: Given the root of a binary tree, return the length of the diameter. The diameter is the length of the longest path between any two nodes. This path may or may not pass through the root. The length is the number of edges between them.
constraints: The number of nodes is in the range [1, 10^4]. -100 <= Node.val <= 100.

performance.stress_intent: kill diameter solutions that recompute height at every node on deep comb trees
